desc.1: Actively involved in various internal projects to develop web applications for jewelers.

desc.1: Worked on a React project for bug reporting.
desc.2: Integrated this project with an existing live chat that was non-functional.
desc.3: Deployed these projects in a Docker container.
desc.4: The chat is a node.js application, using sockets to listen to requests from the site.
desc.5: This project operates with Keybase application.
